data.title: Charles Schwab Considers Launching Its Own Stablecoin
data.description: According to PANews, Charles Schwab's CEO Rick Wurster announced during a Friday earnings call that the company is contemplating the issuance of its own stablecoin. Wurster highlighted the potential role of stablecoins in blockchain transactions, aligning with the company's aspirations to offer such services. The call also revealed that Charles Schwab is preparing to introduce Bitcoin and Ethereum spot ETFs for its clients. Despite managing over $7 trillion in assets, the brokerage giant has maintained a cautious approach towards incorporating cryptocurrency investment options into its offerings.

data.title: REX-Osprey SOL ETF Sees Significant Inflows
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Farside Investors reported that the REX-Osprey SOL spot ETF experienced a net inflow of $11.4 million yesterday. This brings the total net inflow to $92.8 million after market hours.

data.title: James Wynn: BTC.D rebounds, alt season may be postponed
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News James Wynn said on the X platform that as the Bitcoin dominance rate (BTC.D) rebounds, funds are flowing out of altcoins, and the altcoin season that the market originally expected may be temporarily shelved.

data.title: Bitcoin Dominance Rises, Impacting Altcoin Market
data.description: According to Odaily, James Wynn stated on the X platform that as Bitcoin's dominance (BTC.D) increases, funds are moving away from altcoins. This shift suggests that the anticipated altcoin season may be temporarily postponed.

data.title: Tether CEO Commits USDT Compliance with US GENIUS Act
data.description:
Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino aims for USDT compliance with the US GENIUS Act amidst regulatory challenges.
source: https://coincu.com/349492-tether-ceo-usdt-genius-act

data.title: Tether CEO: We will promote USDT compliance and enter the United States
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News After the GENIUS Act was signed, Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino said that he would promote USDT to enter the US market through the "foreign issuer channel" in the new bill, and planned to launch a local dollar stablecoin. Although USDT has never completed a comprehensive audit, Tether promised to meet compliance requirements within three years. (Decrypt)

data.title: Tether Plans Compliance with GENIUS Act for USDT Transactions in the U.S.
data.description:
According to PANews, following the signing of the GENIUS Act by U.S. President Donald Trump, Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino announced the company's intention to ensure its flagship stablecoin, USDT, complies with the Act's regulations for foreign stablecoin issuers to enable transactions within the United States. Ardoino stated that Tether aims to create a U.S.-based stablecoin while seeking approval for USDT under the GENIUS Act. He noted that Tether's products will cater to different needs of U.S. customers, with USDT potentially being used primarily for overseas remittances.

The GENIUS Act mandates foreign issuers to adhere to stringent anti-money laundering laws and undergo complex reserve audits. Although Tether's reserves have never undergone a comprehensive audit, Ardoino mentioned plans for future audits to ensure compliance.

data.title: Trump signs GENIUS Act, the first federal regulatory framework for stablecoins in the United States
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump has officially signed the "GENIUS Act", marking the implementation of the first federal regulation related to crypto assets. The bill requires that stablecoins must be 100% reserved in US dollars or equivalent liquid assets, and annual audits must be conducted on issuers with a market value of more than US$50 billion, while formulating regulatory guidelines for overseas issuance. Executives from Circle, Tether, Coinbase and others attended the signing ceremony, and Trump said that this move will "establish the United States' dominance in global finance and encryption technology." (The Block)

data.title: SharpLink Gaming holds another 19,084 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, SharpLink Gaming added 19,084 ETH to its strategic reserve, which is valued at approximately US$67.52 million at the current price. After the increase, its total Ethereum holdings reached 345,158, with a current market value of approximately US$1.22 billion.

data.description:

source: https://coincu.com/349489-genius-act-stablecoin-regulation-3

data.title: Hackers Persist in Exploiting TeleMessage Vulnerability
data.description: According to Odaily, GreyNoise reports that hackers continue to attempt exploiting the CVE-2025-48927 vulnerability in the TeleMessage application. So far, 11 IP addresses have been identified as attempting attacks, while over 2000 IPs have engaged in reconnaissance activities. This vulnerability is associated with the Spring Boot Actuator component, allowing unauthorized access to heapdump endpoints and extraction of system data. TeleMessage has announced that the vulnerability has been addressed, although the progress of the fix may vary depending on certain conditions.

data.title: Ether.fi will be listed on the HyperLiquid ecosystem and launch beHYPE staking token
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Ether.fi announced that it will enter the HyperLiquid ecosystem and will cooperate with the DeFi protocol HyperBeat to launch the liquidity pledge token beHYPE. In the early stage of the project, the multi-signature guaranteed pre-deposit vault preHYPE will be opened. Users can deposit funds in advance to enjoy early returns and HyperBeat incentive points "hearts" distribution. The vault will be transferred to full smart contract control within six weeks. At present, the total locked amount of HyperEVM has exceeded 2 billion US dollars. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Tiger Global Billionaire Abruptly Dumps Nvidia, Pours $334,000,000 Into Surging US Asset
data.description:
A billionaire who made his fortune at Tiger Global just poured more than $300 million into a high-growth stock that’s skyrocketed over the last year. Karthik Sarma, who now spearheads SRS Investment Management, sold all of the hedge fund’s massive investment in Nvidia (NVDA) between Q1 of 2024 and Q1 of 2025.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/18/tiger-global-billionaire-abruptly-dumps-nvidia-pours-334000000-into-surging-us-asset/

data.title: Analysis: GENIUS Act bans yield-generating stablecoins, which will benefit Ethereum DeFi
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News After the US GENIUS Act officially banned income-generating stablecoins, analysts believe that it will drive funds into the Ethereum DeFi ecosystem. Such stablecoins can bring interest to holders through staking or lending. Analysts pointed out that the ban on stablecoin income will force institutions and users to turn to DeFi protocols on Ethereum to obtain passive income, which is beneficial to ETH and decentralized finance. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Hackers continue to detect TeleMessage vulnerabilities and have made multiple attack attempts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to GreyNoise, hackers are still trying to exploit the CVE-2025-48927 vulnerability in the TeleMessage application. So far, 11 IP addresses have attempted attacks, and more than 2,000 IPs have performed reconnaissance. The vulnerability involves the Spring Boot Actuator component, which can access or heapdump endpoints and extract system data without authentication. TeleMessage has announced that it has fixed the vulnerability, but the progress of the repair may vary depending on conditions. (cointelegraph)
